case_title: BLAYLOCK, CARLA MONICA PINTO et al VS TWELVE GALAXIES, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF ***-**-****, GRANTED CONTINUED FROM ***-**-**** TO JUL-18-2006 AT 01:30 PM

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BLAYLOCK, CARLA MONICA PINTO HOOPER, BRIAN BLAYLOCK, RICHARD MARR, HEATHER MACCIOCCA, GIANLUCA AS TO DEFENDANT TWELVE GALAXIES, LLC BERGERON, ADAM LEVY, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED. ($10.00 FEE PAID). COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.

STIPULATION FOR CONTINUANCE; ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE FILED.
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-06-817034, CSM-06-817035, CSM-06-817037, CSM-06-817038 WITH CASE CSM-06-817033 HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TWELVE GALAXIES, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-23-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-18-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 7/18/06 AT 1:30 P.M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLAYLOCK, CARLA MONICA PINTO HOOPER, BRIAN BLAYLOCK, RICHARD MARR, HEATHER MACCIOCCA, GIANLUCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWELVE GALAXIES, LLC $4,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,250.00, SEE ORDER AT LENGTH. CONSOLIDATED ORDER AFTER HEARING. IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF'S: CARLA MONICA PINTO BLAYLOCK, $750; BRIAN HOOPER, $750; RICHARD BLAYLOCK, $750; HEATHER MARR, $1250; GIANLUCA MACCIOCCA $750. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF THE INDIVIDUAL DEFTS ADAM BERGERON AND ROBERT LEVY, AND AGAINST PLAINTIFFS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISREGARD MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION ENTRY IN THE SYSTEM WITH A COURT DATE. THIS IS A DUMMY MOTION FOR JUDGEMENT PURPOSES PER COURT ORDER.
